data.body: LANDED. Stack submitted (702 top -> 699 ancestor) — BOTH MERGED atomically on main. Story A (audit serve scaffolding) + Story F (/ticket audit page). Epic 2141 audit-trail UI COMPLETE. Final board: epic 2141, story A a3d7, story F ff6f all CLOSED + CERTIFIED (plan-review + completion-verifier). TDD held-out discipline held throughout: implementers saw only happy-path; full held-out oracle validated GREEN (story A 12 tests, story F 15 tests incl teeth-hardened convergence per-series + the code-round nav test the epic verifier required). Both changes: LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1.
